title: Viprasol KNN SuperTrend Engine
author: viprasol
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Viprasol KNN SuperTrend Engine by viprasol.
## Overview The KNN SuperTrend Engine combines a K-Nearest Neighbors machine learning classifier with the SuperTrend indicator to generate high-confidence trend signals.

Instead of relying solely on price crossing a band, this indicator uses 12 technical features across multiple time horizons, optional PCA dimensionality reduction, and Gaussian-weighted neighbor voting to predict market direction.

Only when the KNN prediction aligns with a SuperTrend direction change does a confirmed signal … ## Overview The KNN SuperTrend Engine combines a K-Nearest Neighbors machine learning classifier with the SuperTrend indicator to generate high-confidence trend signals.
Only when the KNN prediction aligns with a SuperTrend direction change does a confirmed signal … Possible indicators: SUPER.
